steps.title: Identify the meaning needed
steps.content: The uncle says the hardest part of telling a story is finding the beginning. Here, part refers to one component or aspect of the larger storytelling process.

steps.title: Match the word to this meaning
steps.content: Element means a component or aspect, which is exactly what the sentence requires. Since finding the beginning is one aspect of storytelling, Element is the precise fit. Zone is a spatial area, Melody is a musical tune, and Blob is a shapeless mass—none of them express the needed meaning. That matches choice C — C is correct.
